code-runner.executorMap.python: cd /Volumes/Code/M5OS && VERSION=$(cat VERSION) && NUMERIC=$(cat NUMERIC_VERSION) && NEW_NUMERIC=$((NUMERIC + 1)) && echo $NEW_NUMERIC > NUMERIC_VERSION && python3 pack.py flash "$VERSION" "$NEW_NUMERIC" && mpremote cp flash.json :/flash/apps/firmware_updater/update.json && mpremote exec "print('Importing firmware update...'); exec(open('/flash/apps/firmware_updater/core.py').read()); print('Installing firmware...'); install_firmware('/flash/apps/firmware_updater/update.json'); import main"
